agentic AI.author: surcomplicated.bsky.social
agentic AI.text: Google wants to make ppl use agentic search despite agentic search being too expensive to do *right* on a completely unmetered free plan. The stuff Google or whoever can afford to give me for free is not suitable for cutting through slop (be it human or AI made), and just gets in my way.
